title: Countered's Push Away
description: A simple mod allowing players to push each other as well as other entities
body:
Countered's Push Away is a fun Minecraft mod that allows you to push other players with a simple right-click. To keep things balanced, the mod includes a cooldown, so players can't spam the push action endlessly.

With Countered's Push Away, you can:
- Push other players and make them trip!
- Create fun moments on your server by subtly nudging your friends out of the way

Whether you're looking to prank your friends or add a dynamic interaction to your server, this mod brings a whole new level of fun to your Minecraft world!

Great for goofing around with your friends!

[https://x.com/RealCountered](https://x.com/RealCountered) 

[https://bsky.app/profile/coun7ered.bsky.social](https://bsky.app/profile/coun7ered.bsky.social)
